body: ระบบคัดกรองความปลอดภัย (Safety Filters) ทั้งฝั่งข้อความ, วิดีโอ และ Text-to-Speech ภาษาไทย มีการตั้งค่าที่ตึงเกินไปและขาดการเข้าใจบริบท (Context) แยกแยะระหว่าง "บทละคร/เนื้อหาสร้างสรรค์เชิงสังคม" กับ "การคุกคามในชีวิตจริง" ไม่ได้ ทำให้ระบบบล็อกคำทั่วไป เช่น การอ้างอิงมาตรากฎหมาย, คำพูดเชือดเฉือนในบทละคร, หรือการจำลองฉากสืบสวน ส่งผลให้ผู้สร้างคอนเทนต์ได้รับประสบการณ์ที่แย่มาก (ห่วย) และไม่สามารถใช้งานระบบต่อได้ โปรดรีบปรับปรุงอัลกอริทึมด่วน
body_en: The safety filter system for text, video and Thai Text-to-Speech is set too strict and lacks context. It can't distinguish between drama/social creative content vs real-life threats. The system blocks common words like legal references, sharp dialogue in plays, or investigative scene simulations. Result: content creators have a very bad experience and can't continue using the system. Please urgently improve the algorithm.

body: Google Flow currently only supports a 1K photo generator, which feels far less practical than working on a desktop. When trying to generate front, back, side, or top-down views from an original image, the system often produces completely unrelated results. I attempted multiple times, but the outputs consistently failed. Since the 5/19/2026 update, the performance has become even worse to the point that the feature is essentially unusable.
body_en: Google Flow currently only supports a 1K photo generator, which feels far less practical than working on a desktop. When trying to generate front, back, side, or top-down views from an original image, the system often produces completely unrelated results. I attempted multiple times, but the outputs consistently failed. Since the 5/19/2026 update, the performance has become even worse to the point that the feature is essentially unusable.

body: Promising tool, but needs refinement "Google Flow has a lot of potential for streamlining workflows, and I appreciate the clean interface. However, I’ve noticed some latency issues during complex operations, and it can be a bit overwhelming for new users to navigate the advanced settings. It’s a good start, but I’m looking forward to more stability and perhaps some more intuitive tutorials in the upcoming!
body_en: Promising tool, but needs refinement. Google Flow has a lot of potential for streamlining workflows, and I appreciate the clean interface. The integration capabilities are quite smooth, which makes it easy to set up basic tasks. However, I've noticed some latency issues during complex operations, and it can be a bit overwhelming for new users to navigate the advanced settings. It's a good start, but I'm looking forward to more stability and perhaps some more intuitive tutorials in the upcoming!
